sub_modules.unsharp_window3x3: Forms a zero-padded 3x3 streaming stencil window from top-level line-buffer taps.
sub_modules.unsharp_gaussian3x3: Computes fixed 3x3 Gaussian blur using weights 1 2 1 / 2 4 2 / 1 2 1 with divide-by-16 normalization.
sub_modules.unsharp_difference: Computes signed high-frequency detail as original pixel minus blurred pixel.
sub_modules.unsharp_gain: Scales the signed high-frequency detail by the runtime gain factor.
sub_modules.unsharp_reconstruct: Adds scaled detail back to the original pixel and saturates to the output pixel range.
